data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures Microsoft site adapts to various device screens, from desktops to mobiles.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CSS media queries and flexible grids.

data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Allows independent scaling and deployment of components.
data.technical_spec: Built using a range of services such as Azure Kubernetes Service.

data.title: Cloud Deployment
data.description: Facilitates deployment and hosting in the cloud, offering scalability.
data.technical_spec: Deployed on Microsoft Azure cloud platform.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Uses a CDN to ensure fast global content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Azure CDN for efficient media asset distribution.

data.title: APIs and Integration
data.description: Facilitates integration with third-party services and internal applications.
data.technical_spec: Wide use of RESTful APIs for seamless data exchange.
